ownership_contract.task_goal: Correct Lode runtime-boundary and Core registry consumption contracts for FR #252.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository plus read-only GitHub issue metadata for #252-#257.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode registry/query fixture, capability boundary docs, focused validator, and LODE-253 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No real Xiaohongshu or BOSS page access
No account, profile, Cookie, or browser state handling
No publish, save, upload, submit, greet, chat, send, apply, schedule, or other external visible action
No hosted registry, marketplace, runtime server, PR creation, push, or issue closeout
ownership_contract.output_format: Worker handoff with worktree, branch, HEAD, status, changed files, validation results, covered issues, and risks.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership stayed inside Lode registry, docs, tools, and LODE-253 carriers.
No live runtime, account, profile, Cookie, production page, or external visible action was touched.

delegation_evidence.rationale: No nested subagent used because this worker owns a narrow shared registry/carrier correction; splitting writes would increase carrier conflict risk.

integration_evidence: Registry entries expose site/task kind, runtime_execution out_of_scope, required_browser_session, identity_profile_requirements, evidence_requirements, write_precheck_boundary, and failure_taxonomy_refs.
Query fixture results expose the same Core-readable fields for the six XHS/BOSS package refs.
Write-precheck packages declare submitted false, no_submit_guard active, and true_write_execution blocked.
Runtime-boundary closeout doc states Lode is not a runner and fixture/contract evidence is not live runtime evidence.
Focused validator passes for all six target package refs.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This branch changes repo-local Lode assets, registry fixtures, docs, focused validation, and item-specific carriers only; it does not add runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Lode validator, local registry, Core/App package discovery, Harbor/Core refs-only evidence requirements, fixture shape, post-check declarations, failure vocabulary, and closeout wording.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR adds live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership changes.
